# misp_organisation (Resource)

A MISP organisation. Organisations own events and attributes and are the primary unit of access control.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_organisation" "acme" {
  name        = "ACME"
  description = "ACME Corp threat intel team"
  type        = "CSIRT"
  nationality = "AU"
  sector      = "Technology"
  local       = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Organisation name. Must be unique within the MISP instance.

### Optional

- `contacts` (String) Contact details.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `local` (Boolean) Whether this organisation is local to the instance (true) or known only by reference (false).
- `nationality` (String) Country code.
- `restricted_to_domain` (List of String) Restrict organisation membership to users with email addresses on these domains.
- `sector` (String) Industry sector.
- `type` (String) Organisation type label (e.g. `ADMIN`, `CSIRT`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.
- `uuid` (String) Stable UUID assigned by MISP.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import an existing MISP organisation by its numeric id.
terraform import misp_organisation.acme 42
```
